title: Croatian Kanten Agar Pudding
description: A tangy and silky dessert featuring kanten agar, perfect for warm weather, this Croatian dish is a crowd pleaser and can be served in scallop shells for a unique presentation.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix the kanten agar powder with a little water to make a paste.
In a medium saucepan, combine the remaining water, coconut milk, maple syrup, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
Add the kanten agar paste to the saucepan and whisk to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Strain the mixture into a clean bowl and discard any solids.
Pour the mixture into scallop shells or individual serving cups.
Refrigerate the pudding for at least 2 hours, or until set.
Just before serving, garnish with dried rose petals if desired.
